title: Industrilization Mod
description: Adds fast-food and convenience store capitalism.
body:
# I LOST ALL THE FILES SO I WON'T BE UPDATING THIS

This mod adds McDonalds and 7/11 (with more soon to come) into minecraft, along with several new items, structures, mobs, blocks, and a boss with it!

## McDonalds
A structure found in most forest biomes, you can find an employee inside selling Happy Meals that come with a McDouble, side item, and free toy for the price for 15 emeralds! However, you can kill them for a key that unlocks the door to a secret relic that can be used to summoned an ancient deity...

## 7/11
A structure also found in most forest biomes, you can buy mountain dew from the cashier for 5 emeralds, giving you speed, haste, and naseua (with a chance of giving you a heart attack) for a few seconds. Using the five-finger discount is an option, however, there's security measures to prevent that. You can also choose to upgrade the mountain dew into variants with different effects, but stolen mountain dew cannot be upgraded.
